title: Nalco is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nalco is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Nalco is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco:
Nalco is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco!
